gist.headline: The timeline branches
gist.blurb: Ever wonder what would happen if you took that other path? A new community app called Parallel uses our text API to simulate alternate timelines of your life.
gist.summary: Added 'Parallel', an alternate-life timeline simulator built by voodoohop, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play with a new text-based simulation app that explores alternate life paths using the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'Parallel', an alternate-life timeline simulator. Visual metaphors: branching paths, multiple timelines, mirrors showing different reflections. The bee (Polly) looking at two different versions of herself in glowing portals or mirrors.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot looking into two glowing lime green (#ecf874) magical mirrors, each showing a different alternate-timeline version of herself—one wearing a tiny wizard hat and the other a painter's beret. Soft pastel gradient background with branching glowing paths. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
